title: caroxylon auricula
intro: Caroxylon auricula, also known as the Golden Burdock or Stinging Burdock, is a species of thistle in the Asteraceae family, characterized by its distinctive golden-yellow flowers and prickly stems. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which make it effective in treating various health issues, including wounds, skin irritations, and digestive problems. The health benefits of Caroxylon auricula include its ability to reduce inflammation, promote wound healing, and provide relief from digestive issues such as diarrhea and constipation. Caroxylon auricula can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in herbal remedies to promote overall health and well-being.
